case_title: DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK VS. RIGOBERTO PADILLA

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT STORES NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PADILLA, RIGOBERTO $1,941.98 PRINCIPAL, $84.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,025.98, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
